title: Mir Tool Event Schema
description: Single tool invocation log. Required for every side-effect tool call. Used for audit, replay, and idempotency verification.

event_id.description: ULID identifier for this tool event.

turn_id.description: ULID of the atomic operation (1 LLM call or 1 tool invoke). Per phase-4-5tier-execution-units.md.

step_id.description: Optional ULID of the parent Step (becomes required in R21+ once run_state.current_step_id is canonical).

idempotency_key.description: Hash derived from (tool + input). Same key + same effect == safe to retry.

precondition.description: Expression evaluated before tool call. Empty if no precondition.

dry_run.description: If true, tool runs in preview mode without side effects.

side_effect_summary.description: One-line description of what changes. Required for side-effect tools.

provider.description: OpenTelemetry gen_ai.provider — LLM/MCP provider name (e.g., 'anthropic', 'openai-codex', 'mcp.discord'). R7-C-W5 : OTel GenAI namespace  (phase-6 §6 ADR  29  ).

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the tool was invoked.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the tool call in milliseconds.

result.description: Outcome of the tool call. 'already_applied' indicates idempotent no-op.

recoverable.description: If true, retry is safe; if false, escalate to BLOCKED or INTERRUPTED.

details_ref.description: Path or id pointing to full error details (stack trace, full stderr, etc.).

error.description: Required if result in [error, denied, timeout].
